title: The Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991
full_text: The Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 लोक दायित्‍व बीमा अधिनियम, 1991 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1991-6 Act Number: 6 Enactment Date: 1991-01-22 Act Year: 1991 Short Title: The Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 Hindi Title: लोक दायित्‍व बीमा अधिनियम, 1991 Long Title: An Act to provide for public liability insurance for the purpose of providing immediate relief to the persons affected by accident occurring while handling any hazardous substance and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change Enforcement Date: 01-04-1991 Notification: 1st April, 1991, vide notification No. G.S.R 253 dated 27th March, 1991, see Gazette of India Ordinary, Part II sec.3(i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Liability to give relief in certain cases on principle of no fault. Section 4. Duty of owner to take out insurance policies. Section 5. Verification and publication of accident by Collector. Section 6. Application for claim for relief. Section 7. Award of relief. Show Related Subordinates Section 7A. Establishment of Environmental Relief Fund. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Provisions as to other right to claim compensation for death, etc. Section 9. Power to call for information. Section 10. Power of entry and inspection. Section 11. Power of search and seizure. Section 12. Power to give directions. Section 13. Power to make application to Courts for restraining owner from handling hazardous substances. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Penalty for contravention. Section 15. Penalty for non-compliance of directions. Section 15A. Adjudicating officer. Section 15B. Appeal. Section 16. Omitted. Section 17. Penalty for contravention by Government Department. Section 17A. Penalty amount to be credited to Environmental Relief Fund. Section 17B. Offence for failure to pay penalty or additional penalty. Section 18. Cognizance of offences. Show Related Subordinates Section 19. Power to delegate. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 21. Advisory Committee. Section 22. Effect of other laws. Section 23. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Schedule 1.
